violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/23/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the blower fans in the walk in cooler, and the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-Food Contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025
The floor in the walk in coolers is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine is out of service until cleaned. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets on the door to walk-in cooler were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be kept in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024
The floor in the prepared foods walk-in cooler is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2025
